name: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Industrial
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Industrial
short_description: Quad-core ARM Cortex-A73 at 2.2 GHz, 3 GB RAM, 128 GB microSD, (4) 2.5 Gbps + (1) 10 Gbps RJ45, (1) 10G SFP+, PoE+ and PoE+++, WiFi 6/7
description: Quad-core ARM Cortex-A73 at 2.2 GHz, 3 GB RAM, 128 GB microSD, (4) 2.5 Gbps + (1) 10 Gbps RJ45, (1) 10G SFP+, PoE+ and PoE+++, WiFi 6/7

detailed_description.heading: High Density Gateway
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Industrial is engineered for demanding environments where performance, reliability, and scalability are critical. Designed as a ruggedized and fanless solution, it operates efficiently in challenging conditions while maintaining consistent network performance. With support for over 500 simultaneous users and the ability to manage more than 50 UniFi devices, this gateway is built for high density deployments in industrial, commercial, or large scale enterprise settings. Its architecture is optimized to support advanced UniFi applications, including Network, Protect, Access, Talk, and Connect, all within a single integrated platform. This allows administrators to manage complex infrastructures from a unified interface, simplifying operations and reducing system complexity. The device also supports a wide range of connected hardware, including high resolution cameras and access control systems, making it a versatile foundation for integrated network environments. Designed for flexible installation, the gateway supports wall mounting, desktop placement with an included stand, or rack mounting with an optional accessory. Its compact yet durable construction, combining polycarbonate and aluminum alloy materials, ensures long term reliability in both controlled and harsh environments.

detailed_description.heading: Intelligent Network Control
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Cloud Gateway Industrial integrates a comprehensive suite of advanced security and networking technologies designed to protect and optimize modern infrastructures. At its core is a high performance security engine featuring a stateful firewall and application aware Layer 7 filtering, enabling deep inspection and precise control of network traffic based on applications, domains, and user defined rules. The built in intrusion detection and prevention system delivers real time threat monitoring and mitigation, supported by a database of over 55,000 signatures. This provides strong protection against evolving cyber threats without requiring additional licensing. Additional features such as content filtering and ad blocking further enhance network safety and improve user experience. For secure connectivity across locations, the device supports multiple VPN technologies including WireGuard, OpenVPN, and IPsec. Zero configuration VPN options simplify deployment, while site to site connectivity enables seamless communication between distributed networks. The integrated SD WAN functionality allows intelligent traffic routing and optimization without added complexity. Advanced networking features such as VLAN based segmentation, dynamic routing, and quality of service management ensure efficient traffic handling and network stability. Multi WAN load balancing and failover capabilities further improve reliability, making the gateway suitable for mission critical deployments where uptime and security are essential.

detailed_description.heading: Powerful Hardware
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Cloud Gateway Industrial is built on a powerful hardware platform designed to support high performance networking and intensive workloads. It features a quad core ARM processor running at 2.2 GHz, combined with 3 GB of system memory, enabling smooth operation across multiple applications and large numbers of connected devices. For connectivity, the device offers a versatile range of high speed interfaces, including 10 GbE and 2.5 GbE ports, as well as a 10G SFP+ uplink. The integrated switch includes multiple PoE capable ports, supporting both PoE+ and PoE+++ standards, allowing direct powering of connected devices such as cameras, access points, and other network equipment. With a total system power capacity of 350W and a combined PoE budget distributed between DC and ATX inputs, the gateway is capable of supporting high density PoE deployments without the need for additional power infrastructure. This makes it especially suitable for environments where multiple powered devices must be deployed efficiently. The device also includes a pre installed 128 GB microSD card for local storage, with support for expansion via the same slot. This allows storage of application data such as video recordings or logs directly on the gateway. Combined with its fanless cooling design and wide operating temperature range, the UniFi Cloud Gateway Industrial delivers reliable performance in even the most demanding conditions.
